scripts.dev: cd frontend && pnpm vite --port 5173 --mode test --logLevel error
scripts.build: node scripts/pnpm-only.mjs && cd frontend && pnpm vite build --mode production
scripts.build:test: node scripts/pnpm-only.mjs && rm -rf frontend/dist && cd frontend && pnpm vite build --mode test
scripts.preview: node scripts/pnpm-only.mjs && cd frontend && pnpm vite preview
scripts.preview:test: node scripts/pnpm-only.mjs && cd frontend && pnpm vite preview --mode test
scripts.quality: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm eslint-disable
scripts.test:infra: pnpm quality && pnpm test:unit && pnpm build:test && pnpm test:e2e --project=infra-probe
scripts.test:full: pnpm quality && pnpm test:unit && pnpm build:test && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:int:local: node scripts/pnpm-only.mjs && cross-env VITE_USE_LIVE_DB=true playwright test tests/live/auth.live.spec.ts tests/live/upgrade.live.spec.ts tests/live/analytics-journey.live.spec.ts --config=playwright.live.config.ts
scripts.ci:unit:fast: node scripts/pnpm-only.mjs && pnpm quality && concurrently -n unit1,unit2,unit3,unit4 -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "pnpm ci:unit:shard 1 4" "pnpm ci:unit:shard 2 4" "pnpm ci:unit:shard 3 4" "pnpm ci:unit:shard 4 4"
scripts.rc:dast:local: cross-env BASE_URL= pnpm build:test && cross-env BASE_URL= pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/primary-journey.e2e.spec.ts tests/e2e/user-features.e2e.spec.ts tests/e2e/error-states.e2e.spec.ts tests/e2e/analytics-truth.e2e.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts --project=full-suite --reporter=line --output=test-results/playwright-dast-local
scripts.rc:dast:live: node scripts/rc-dast-live-preflight.mjs && cross-env VITE_USE_LIVE_DB=true pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/cloud-token-gates.live.spec.ts tests/live/stripe-checkout-readiness.live.spec.ts tests/live/stripe-webhook-readiness.live.spec.ts tests/live/user-filler-words-persistence.live.spec.ts tests/live/stt-switching-contract.live.spec.ts --config=playwright.deployed-live.config.ts --project=deployed-live-chromium --reporter=line
scripts.rc:ux:smoke: cross-env BASE_URL= pnpm build:test && cross-env BASE_URL= pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/primary-journey.e2e.spec.ts tests/e2e/user-features.e2e.spec.ts tests/e2e/error-states.e2e.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts --project=full-suite --reporter=line --output=test-results/playwright-ux-smoke
scripts.rc:gate:2:sast: pnpm quality && pnpm rc:sast:secrets && node scripts/rc-production-hardening.mjs && pnpm test:edge && pnpm exec vitest run --config frontend/vitest.config.mjs --coverage.enabled=false frontend/src/config/__tests__/env.test.ts frontend/src/constants/__tests__/subscriptionTiers.test.ts frontend/src/hooks/__tests__/useSessionLifecycle.test.tsx frontend/src/services/transcription/__tests__/TranscriptionPolicy.test.ts frontend/src/services/transcription/__tests__/TranscriptionService.race.test.ts frontend/src/services/transcription/__tests__/TranscriptionService.zombie.test.ts frontend/src/utils/__tests__/fillerWordUtils.test.ts frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechRecognition/__tests__/integration.test.tsx
scripts.rc:gates: pnpm rc:gate:1:product && pnpm rc:gate:2:sast && pnpm rc:gate:3:dast && pnpm rc:gate:4:sca && pnpm rc:gate:5:ux
scripts.ci:dispatch:deploy: echo '🚀 Dispatching deploy smoke...' && gh workflow run canary.yml && echo '✅ Dispatched. Monitor: gh run list --limit 1'
scripts.ci:dispatch:soak: echo '🚀 Dispatching soak test...' && gh workflow run soak-test.yml && echo '✅ Dispatched. Monitor: gh run list --limit 1'
scripts.benchmark:browser: node scripts/pnpm-only.mjs && playwright test tests/live/benchmark-native.live.spec.ts tests/live/benchmark-cpu.live.spec.ts tests/live/benchmark-webgpu.live.spec.ts --config=playwright.live.config.ts --project=live-stt-chromium --reporter=list
